formDescription: This form collects the information needed to apply for a BC recreational freshwater fishing licence, including applicant details, residency status, licence duration, fishing region, and any optional Classified Waters Licence or Conservation Surcharge stamps.

dob.title: Date of Birth
dob.description: The applicant's date of birth, used to determine age-based eligibility (e.g. seniors 65+)

residency.title: Residency Status
residency.description: Determines the licence fee category for the applicant

wid.title: Fish and Wildlife ID (WID)
wid.description: Existing Fish and Wildlife ID number. Leave blank if the applicant needs to register for a new WID

licenceDuration.title: Licence Duration
licenceDuration.description: The length of the freshwater fishing licence being applied for

seniorRate.title: Senior Rate (65+)
seniorRate.description: Whether the applicant is 65 or older and eligible for the resident senior annual rate

disabilityReduction.title: Disability Fee Reduction
disabilityReduction.description: Whether the applicant holds a Certificate of Eligibility for the angling licence fee reduction program (severe and permanent disability)

coeNumber.title: Certificate of Eligibility Number
coeNumber.description: Required only if the applicant has indicated they hold a disability fee reduction Certificate of Eligibility

location.title: Location
location.description: Select the region where you plan to fish
enum: Region 1 - Vancouver Island (includes Haida Gwaii: WMU 6-12, 6-13)
location.default: Region 1 - Vancouver Island (includes Haida Gwaii: WMU 6-12, 6-13)

classifiedWaters.title: Classified Waters Licence
classifiedWaters.description: Whether the applicant wants to add a Classified Waters Licence for a Class I or Class II water

classifiedWaterName.title: Classified Water Name / Region
classifiedWaterName.description: The name of the Classified Water or region the applicant intends to fish, e.g. Dean River, Skagit River, or a Kootenay region river

surcharge.title: Conservation Surcharge Stamps
surcharge.description: Conservation Surcharge stamps required based on the species the applicant intends to fish for or retain (you can select multiple)

estimatedCost.title: Estimated Licence Cost
estimatedCost.description: Read-only field showing the calculated total cost of the licence based on residency, licence duration, and any selected surcharges or add-ons
